creator: rhyous@yahoo.com
text:
Issue
======
A Lenovo T61p has three sound buttons on the top left.

Mute, Sound down, Sound up

When I press mute nothing appears to happen.  

When I press sound up or down, my system mutes the pcm but moves the muted Mic sound up and down, instead of the speaker sound.

If I unmute the Mic, then when I press sound up or down, my system doesn't mute the pcm but will not go below 95:95 no matter how many times I push sound down.

Expected
=========
mute to mute.
Sound up and sound down to work

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD.  I am in a desktop environemnt setup as documented here:
http://rhyous.com/2009/12/18/how-to-install-and-configure-a-freebsd-8-desktop-with-xorg-and-kde/
